projects.title: MeBeBot — Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform
projects.desc: Full-stack SaaS across React, React Native, and Angular with Python, Node.js, and Java backends. Multi-tenant architecture on AWS and GCP with AI-driven workflows and real-time APIs.

projects.title: AI Backend Services
projects.desc: Python microservices (FastAPI, Flask, Django) for AI features in production. GPT-4 APIs, TensorFlow, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes at scale.

projects.title: Uber Marketplace & Operations Tools
projects.desc: Java and Node.js services for riders and drivers, plus Next.js dashboards for operations. Microservices and high-volume APIs with strong reliability practices.

projects.title: Real-Time & High-Volume APIs
projects.desc: REST and WebSocket APIs for real-time communication and heavy traffic, with Redis caching and performance tuning under load.

projects.title: CI/CD & Cloud Infrastructure
projects.desc: Docker and Kubernetes on AWS/GCP with Jenkins and Terraform. CI/CD improvements cut deployment time by ~50% and improved release stability.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.desc: Personal portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Showcases experience, projects, and skills with a responsive, animated UI.
